headlines.title: Israel attacks major Iranian petrochemical site after Trump's infrastructure threats
headlines.summary: Israel claims the site produces half of Iran's petrochemical output. The Israeli attack follows Donald Trump threatening more US attacks if the Strait of Hormuz is not open by Tuesday.

headlines.title: US carries out daring rescue of service member in Iran
headlines.summary: A mountain hideout and aircraft under fire: The operation to extract the airman from hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

headlines.title: Trump issues expletive-laden threat to Iran over Hormuz Strait blockage
headlines.summary: The US president says he will destroy Iranian power plants and bridges if the vital waterway is not reopened before an apparent deadline.

headlines.title: IAEA confirms military strikes close to Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant
headlines.summary: The International Atomic Energy Agency confirmed recent impacts of military strikes but said the plant itself was not damaged.

headlines.title: Kremlin says Middle East is 'on fire' due to US and Israeli attacks on Iran
headlines.summary: The Kremlin said the Iran war was escalating in both geography and economic impact, with the whole Middle East region affected.

headlines.title: DR Congo agrees to take deportees from the US
headlines.summary: The country will start receiving deportees from this month but has not said how many they will accept.

headlines.title: Emergency jabs after 100 children die of suspected measles in Bangladesh
headlines.summary: More than 100 people, mostly children, have been killed by measles since mid-March, officials suspect.

headlines.title: Nigerian army rescues 31 held after Easter church attack
headlines.summary: Five civilians were killed by the gunmen and their bodies were recovered at the scene, the army said.

headlines.title: Pope Leo XIV calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
headlines.summary: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.

headlines.title: Spain's ruling Socialist Party gains support amid opposition to US-Israeli war on Iran
headlines.summary: Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's staunch opposition to the war has boosted support, while far-right Vox has seen a decline.
